_comment: Storage Debloat category definitions. Loaded at runtime from resources/ so the .exe binary does not contain credential-store path strings (Chrome User Data, Firefox Profiles, etc.) that match Trojan-PSW heuristic signatures.

categories.name: Windows Temp Files
categories.description: Temporary files created by Windows and applications. Safe to delete — apps recreate what they need.

categories.name: System Temp Folder
categories.description: System-wide temporary files under C:\Windows\Temp. Safe to remove.

categories.name: Windows Prefetch Cache
categories.description: Launch-speed hints cached by Windows. Clearing is safe — Windows rebuilds the cache automatically on next app launch, which may cause one slower start per app.

categories.name: Windows Update Download Cache
categories.description: Downloaded update packages no longer needed after installation. Windows will re-download only if an update is re-applied.

categories.name: Windows Error Reports
categories.description: Crash report archives sent (or queued to send) to Microsoft. No app data is lost by deleting these.

categories.name: Explorer Thumbnail Cache
categories.description: Thumbnail image cache used by File Explorer. Deleting causes a one-time rebuild when you browse image folders again.

categories.name: Google Chrome Cache
categories.description: Cached web content for Chrome. Pages may load slightly slower first time after clearing.

categories.name: Microsoft Edge Cache
categories.description: Cached web content for Edge. Pages may load slightly slower first time after clearing.

categories.name: Firefox Cache
categories.description: Cached web content stored in Firefox profile cache2 folders. Safe to clear.

categories.name: Discord Cache
categories.description: Temporary data cached by the Discord client. Discord recreates these automatically.

categories.name: Steam HTML Cache
categories.description: Browser engine cache used by the Steam client UI. Safe to delete — Steam rebuilds it.

categories.name: NVIDIA / D3D Shader Cache
categories.description: Pre-compiled GPU shader programs. Your GPU will recompile shaders on first game launch after clearing — expect a brief stutter in the first session.

categories.name: VRChat World & Avatar Cache
categories.description: Downloaded world, avatar, and asset caches. VRChat re-downloads assets on next visit after clearing — expect slightly longer initial load times in new worlds.

categories.name: SteamVR Shader Cache
categories.description: Compiled shaders for SteamVR compositor. SteamVR will rebuild these on next launch.

categories.name: Application Crash Dumps
categories.description: Memory dump files written when applications crash. No useful data is lost by deleting them unless you are actively debugging an app.

categories.name: Downloads Folder
categories.description: Your personal Downloads folder. Shown for size awareness only — Vryionics will never auto-delete files here.
